transcript.text:
[North Korean Style Braised Chicken?]
[And it's white?]
[That's not all]
[Braised Chicken, Hot Noodles, Buckwheat Noodles, Spicy Noodles, Dumplings, Mung Bean Pancakes]
[Slow down]
[Noodles on a rainy day]
[Falling in love...]
[Lovely]
[Very good...!]
Hello everyone
I'm here near Yaksu Station today
I crave noodles on a rainy Summer day
This place is very popular
It's been here for over 40 years
They sell braised chicken and buckwheat noodles
[Manpo Makguksu] [Seoul, Jung-gu]

It's actually my 3rd time here
And it has always been too crowded here for me to film
I came here as soon as lunch hours finished
I can finally film here
[Excited]
They're making dumplings
[I must have some of that too]
[Today's menu]
1 plate of dumplings,
Mung bean pancakes are a must too
Their braised chicken is North Korean Style
1 braised chicken,
hot noodles, buckwheat noodles, spicy noodles,
1 plate of dumplings,
Slow down
Slowly?

Braised chicken, dumplings,
Hot noodles, buckwheat noodles, spicy noodles,
mung bean pancake
That's all
All of those?
Can a skinny person like you eat that much?
I'm a big eater
[Let's make the noodles first]
[Wash the cooked noodles with cold water]
[Dongchimi broth (radish water kimchi)]
[Cold buckwheat noodles]
[Spicy one too!]
[Hot noodles]
[A unique-style braised chicken]
[Green onion on top, the North Korean way]
[Handmade dumplings]

[All ready to go]
Wow, thank you
Spicy mustard and vinegar
And also with the seasoning paste
[Come here!]
Bon appetit
Look how much they give you
This is a lot Look at this
This one first
The broth is white like rice water
Let's try the broth
Tastes like dongchimi
I love it
Not bland
Sweet and sour
I want it without the seasoning paste

Will it be better with it?
Comes with cucumbers, but I asked them not to include it
Refreshing
Sweet & sour dongchimi soup with some spiciness
The noodles are chewy
You're supposed to eat it with chicken
I had some noodles with braised chicken before
[She ate a lot this time too...]
It's buckwheat noodles and braised chicken today
Just like this
People sometimes comment "Why say it's good when you didn't even chew"
I can tell it's good right away
The chicken is hot and tender
So good together
So tender and tasty
Seasoned really well Dip it here

Chicken breast first while it's still warm
Dip it
[Pause...]
Which one first?
Hot one first
This has chicken toppings
Some soup
[Such a good eater...]
Reminds me of Soup Jjolmyun (chewy noodles)
Kimchi for this
[Too focused on eating]
[I'll leave this here]
They've been making the dumplings here
This should be their main item
[Wait]
Tzuyang?

I'm a subscriber
-Really? -Yes
Hello
[Notifications on]
Thank you
[A bite of the dumpling]
It's completely packed
It gets tastier and tastier More flavors over time
Mung bean pancake
The crispiness
It's good Very crispy
Not a lot of flour-taste
[Now for the spicy buckwheat noodles]
Pretty thick and heavy
That's good
The seasoning has a kick to it

Does it have sesame oil?
Some type of oil
It's seasoned just right I thought it would be salty, but it's not
[Proud]
This is good too
I feel like I've been eating lots of North Korean Style dishes
They're very plain and bland at first
I think that's why I crave it more
Like pizza
[No thanks]
Let's use the hands
Finger-food is the best
Spicy seasoned noodles
With some braised chicken
Thank you
Gloves on

I will get all the meat out
Some green onions too
This is how it's done This is the real deal
This is how you're supposed to eat it
Everything here tastes better and better over time
That's the thing about North Korean Style foods
Put it on top like this
[As a whole]
With the paste
Juicy and tender
Completely different from the breast
Wrap it like this
Using my hands
Plain, but so good
I usually eat a lot of those cheaply made frozen dumplings with lots of seasoning
This is very plain, but so good

Their dumplings are the best
Let's try the part with some meat
These dishes are pretty nice for a rainy day
Chicken neck I like this part
It's good
Chewy, yet soft
Maybe because it's only a little bit of meat here
I usually never leave any meat behind when I eat chicken
I scrape out everything
But the neck is pretty hard
Finish the pancakes first
The meat is very tender
Didn't think the quality would be this good
[Scanning]
Hot noodles first
I'll try the meat here too

I've never had good quality meat inside cold noodles
[Last piece of dumpling too]
Drumstick too
[Culture shock]
Incredible
Thank you
She doesn't even gain weight
Everything goes to fat for me
Maybe she exercises a lot
[Exercise? What's that?]
[Precious subscriber]
[Good job, my YouTuber!]
[Photos too]
I'm showing this to my friends
